ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insiders" (
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the insider */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the company (e.g., Director, Large Shareholder) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the insider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the insider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the insider */,
  "position" TEXT /* Exact position or role within the company */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the insider joined the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the insider (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insider making the transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "remaining_holdings" INTEGER /* Remaining holdings after the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of filing (e.g., Form 4) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_insider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_id") REFERENCES insiders ("insider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insider who made the filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company involved in the filing */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of filing (e.g., Form 4) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the filing (e.g., Draft, Submitted, Approved) */,
  "filing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the filing */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_insider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_id") REFERENCES insiders ("insider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for company inquiries */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insider_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insider */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Director, Officer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_relationships_insider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_id") REFERENCES insiders ("insider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_relationships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of what was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "insider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insider the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Unread, Read) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_insider_id FOREIGN KEY ("insider_id") REFERENCES insiders ("insider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Compliance Officer, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User associated with the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
